description: Chinese: a query/read intent ('查一下我未处理的采购申请') — resolver should refuse since reads go through GraphQL, not Actions

input.userMessage: 查一下我未处理的采购申请

meta.notes: Per CLAUDE.md: 'Action as Sole Write Entry — All mutations flow through Actions. GraphQL handles reads only.' No read action exists in the catalog, so resolver should refuse.
